message:
chore(deps): update workspace dependencies

Bumps workspace-level dependencies and updates Cargo.lock to reflect
the new rand crate addition for the celebration UI feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2936,7 +2936,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -2981,7 +2981,7 @@ dependencies = [

 name = "rch-common"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",

  "tracing-subscriber",

  "uuid",
  "whoami",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-telemetry"
-version = "0.1.0"
